name: @arves/cognitive-studio
description: ARVES Cognitive Studio (P6 preview) — graph-as-data authoring of cognitive graphs: certified capability nodes, truth-committed execution on the frozen Runtime v1.0 Kernel, reproducible ContentIds, self-contained static HTML render. NOT an interactive GUI editor.

platform.consumes: ARVES Runtime v1.0 (P0 SDK + P6.5 Ecosystem Kit + Bridge -> real Kernel) — FROZEN
proves: reproducible ContentIds on a fresh Kernel
